ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for alerts */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., above, below) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement for threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the measurement */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target being measured */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "bin_start_incl" INTEGER /* Start of the time bin (inclusive) */,
  "bin_end_notincl" INTEGER /* End of the time bin (not inclusive) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "validity_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the validity of the measurement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the historical data */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target of the historical data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of the measurements for the year */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the measurements for the year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the quality of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the prediction */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target being predicted */,
  "predicted_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the measurement */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used to make the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement used in the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the stakeholder */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the stakeholder belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder */,
  "alert_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for alerts (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of notifications (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholder_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert sent to stakeholders */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stakeholder who received the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the stakeholder's response to the alert */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the stakeholder responded to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholder_alerts_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id")
)
